name: Dellan Moor
excerpt: Dellan Moor is a former soldier living in hiding after deserting his regiment.
notes: Dellan Moor, 29, is a former soldier who served in the 14th Lowland infantry regiment. He deserted fourteen months ago during a reassignment to a punitive posting. Currently, he lives with Sable Voss in a disused highwayman's waystation on the moorland north of the main coastal road. They have been there for eight months, growing food and making occasional trips to rural markets. Dellan is skilled in carpentry, basic medicine, and animal husbandry due to his regiment's focus on labor and construction. He trusts Sable completely, though he is uncertain about the permanence of their relationship. Dellan is lean, with a darker complexion and a regimental tattoo on his left shoulder.
